arXiv.title: Simultaneous $ГЋВ±ГЋВІ$ Decay: A New Mode of Nuclear Instability
arXiv.abstract: We propose simultaneous $ГЋВ±ГЋВІ$ decay as a novel mode of nuclear instability that involves the strong and weak interactions in a single quantum transition. We develop a theoretical framework to predict its branching ratios and $ГЋВ±$-energy spectra, establishing exclusive and inclusive criteria based on whether the individual $ГЋВ±$ and $ГЋВІ$ channels are closed or open. A global survey of the nuclear chart identifies five exclusive $ГЋВ±ГЋВІ^-$ candidates, all predicted to be experimentally inaccessible, and ranks the leading inclusive candidates for both the $ГЋВ±ГЋВІ^-$ and $ГЋВ±ГЋВІ^+$ modes. Remarkably, six of the top $ГЋВ±ГЋВІ^+$ candidates coincide with known $ГЋВІ$-delayed-$ГЋВ±$ precursors. The observed $ГЋВ±$ spectra are naturally accounted for by simultaneous $ГЋВ±ГЋВІ^+$ emission, suggesting direct decay as the dominant underlying mechanism. Our findings establish simultaneous $ГЋВ±ГЋВІ$ decay as a distinct radioactive process and a sensitive probe of the interplay between the strong and weak interactions.
